comment_text:
Hawk is clearly superior to Tory in both offense and defense. While Tory’s offense is decent, her weak defense holds her back. Hawk, on the other hand, has fought stronger opponents like Miguel, Robby, and Kwon—fighters better than Tory.

From Season 2 onward, Hawk has consistently proven himself. He sparred evenly with Miguel in Season 6, beat Robby in the Season 4 tournament, defeated Yoon, dropped Maria, and landed hits on Kwon. He also beat Maria, who easily defeated Sam. Even before Demetri kicked him off the platform, Hawk had already beaten Maria.

In Season 4, he technically beat Miguel, who dropped out due to injury, and officially won by defeating Robby. His record against stronger competition proves he’s the better fighter.
